business.name: Done Right Handyman Services
business.tagline: Getting it done right the first time

hero.headline: The handyman Virginia Beach *trusts to get it right*
hero.subheadline: From shiplap walls to fence repairs — quality work that stands up to coastal weather.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Home repairs that actually last
services_section.subheading: Every project gets the owner's personal attention

services.title: Fence Installation & Repair
services.description: Custom fencing built to handle Hampton Roads weather. Gates that swing smooth, posts that stay straight.

services.title: Interior Carpentry
services.description: Shiplap walls, trim work, and built-ins. Clean lines, tight joints, finished right.

services.title: Home Maintenance
services.description: Those nagging repairs that keep getting pushed off. We knock them out efficiently.

services.title: Drywall & Painting
services.description: Patch holes, fix cracks, paint that goes on smooth. Your walls will look brand new.

about.heading: Owner-operated handyman service in Virginia Beach
about.body: Terry personally handles every project for Done Right Handyman Services. When you call, you're talking directly to the guy who'll be doing the work. Small team, personal service, and quality that shows in every detail.

reviews.name: Alan D.
reviews.text: Terry and his crew did several projects including a shiplap wall. Quality service from him and his small team.

reviews.name: Martine N.
reviews.text: Hired them for fence installation. They were friendly and did good work on the install.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Virginia Beach and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout Hampton Roads

cta.heading: Ready to get it done right?
cta.body: Call Terry directly for a straight answer on your project. Free estimates, honest pricing, quality work.
